center.name: Costa Rican Central Valley
center.summary: Costa Rican Central Valley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Olive sparrow、White-eared ground sparrow、Cabanis's ground sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Cabanis's ground sparrow is found in the highlands of north-central Costa Rica's Central Valley approximately between northern San José Province and central Cartago Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: superciliosus: Pacific slope from southwestern Nicaragua into northwestern Costa Rica to the Valle Central in San José Province The olive sparrow inhabits a variety of landscapes across its wide range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in east-central Honduras and separately in north-central Nicaragua. The nominate is found in Costa Rica's Central Valley from far northeastern Puntarenas and western Alajuela provinces south to central San José Province. The species inhabits a variety of somewhat open landscapes including many that are human-modified
